audit_items.proof_trace: `returnData` is allocated with `new bytes[](calls.length)` (L56), guaranteeing `len(returnData) == len(calls)`. The sequential loop (L58-60) writes `returnData[i] = _call(calls[i].target, calls[i].data)` for every index 0..length-1 with no skipping or reordering. If any `_call` reverts the entire transaction reverts, so no partial state exists.
